leadText: The Focus Sash (Japanese: きあいのタスキ Fighting Spirit Sash) is a type of held item introduced in Generation IV that prevents the holder from fainting in one hit.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Contents 1 Effect 1.1 In Battle 1.1.1 Generation IV 1.1.2 Generation V onward 1.2 Outside of Battle 1.2.1 Generations IV through VIII 1.2.2 Generation IX Effect [ edit | edit source ] In Battle [ edit | edit source ] Generation IV [ edit | edit source ] If the holder has full HP and is hit by a move that would otherwise cause fainting (including a one-hit knockout move ), the Focus Sash will enable it to survive with 1 HP. The Focus Sash can also protect against self-inflicted confusion damage . It can protect from all strikes of a multistrike move , but not from damage from Future Sight or Doom Desire . Once used up, the Focus Sash disappears. Generation V onward [ edit | edit source ] From Generation V on, the Focus Sash will only protect its holder from the first strike of a multistrike move . Outside of Battle [ edit | edit source ] Generations IV through VIII [ edit | edit source ] Focus Sash has no effect outside of battle. Generation IX [ edit | edit source ] A used-up Focus Sash will now replenish after battle.

sections.title: In Battle
sections.text: In Battle [ edit | edit source ] Generation IV [ edit | edit source ] If the holder has full HP and is hit by a move that would otherwise cause fainting (including a one-hit knockout move ), the Focus Sash will enable it to survive with 1 HP. The Focus Sash can also protect against self-inflicted confusion damage . It can protect from all strikes of a multistrike move , but not from damage from Future Sight or Doom Desire . Once used up, the Focus Sash disappears. Generation V onward [ edit | edit source ] From Generation V on, the Focus Sash will only protect its holder from the first strike of a multistrike move .

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description D P Pt HG SS B W B2 W2 An item to be held by a Pokémon. If it has full HP, the holder will endure one potential KO attack, leaving 1 HP. X Y OR AS S M US UM P E Sw Sh BD SP LA An item to be held by a Pokémon. If the holder has full HP, it will endure a potential KO attack with 1 HP. The item then disappears. S V ZA An item to be held by a Pokémon. If the holder has full HP and is hit with a move that should knock it out, it will endure with 1 HP—but only once.
